calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify And Divide Trust
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Susan Von Herrman and Jenny Sweetland for Eiliana Yoneda (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it has many concerns about the matter. Ms. Von Herrman provided Trust history, family relationships and family dynamics, explained that Eiliana wants to share with her Family, reasons for division of the Trust, explained who the Trustees will be of the three new Trusts, etc. The Petition to Modify and Divide Trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
